export type GeometricBackgroundProps = React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> & {
  /** Background pattern to render. */
  variant?: GeometricBackgroundVariant;
};

/**
 * Full-bleed decorative background. Drop it as the first child of a `relative`
 * container; your content sits above it at `z-raised` or higher.
 */
const GeometricBackground = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  GeometricBackgroundProps
>(
  (
    { variant = "purple-gradient-grid-right", className, style, ...props },
    ref,
  ) => (
    <div
      ref={ref}
      data-slot="geometric-background"
      aria-hidden="true"
      className={`absolute inset-0 z-base ${className ?? ""}`}
      style={{ ...variantStyles[variant], ...style }}
      {...props}
    />
  ),
);
GeometricBackground.displayName = "GeometricBackground";

export { GeometricBackground };
